tools.name: Claude Code
tools.priceDescription: $20/月（Claude Pro订阅，按Token计费，Max版$100-$200 / 月）
tools.priceDescriptionEn: $20/month (Claude Pro subscription, token-based billing, Max version $100-$200/month)
tools.description: 命令行 AI Agent，在终端里自主完成编程任务。不是补全工具，是真正的编程 Agent。给它一个任务描述，它会自己读代码、分析架构、修改多个文件、跑测试、提交 Git。支持 CLAUDE.md 自定义规范，Hooks 机制可以在关键节点插入自动化脚本。
tools.descriptionEn: Command line AI Agent that autonomously completes programming tasks in the terminal. Not a completion tool, but a true programming Agent. Give it a task description, it will read code, analyze architecture, modify multiple files, run tests, and commit Git. Supports CLAUDE.md custom specifications, Hooks mechanism can insert automated scripts at key nodes.

tools.name: Codex
tools.priceDescription: ChatGPT Plus $20/月（含Codex）；Pro $100 / 月；按需 Pay-as-you-go
tools.description: OpenAI 出品的 AI 编程工具，提供智能代码补全、代码解释、代码生成等功能。与 ChatGPT 深度集成，支持多种编程语言，适合各种开发场景。
tools.descriptionEn: AI programming tool developed by OpenAI, provides intelligent code completion, code explanation, code generation and other functions. Deeply integrated with ChatGPT, supports multiple programming languages, suitable for various development scenarios.

tools.name: Trae
tools.priceDescription: 国内版永久免费；国际版 Pro $10 / 月
tools.priceDescriptionEn: Domestic version permanently free; International version Pro $10/month
tools.description: 国内 AI 编程工具，支持智能代码补全、AI 辅助重构、测试生成等功能。界面美观，操作直观，适合各种开发场景。
tools.descriptionEn: Domestic AI programming tool, supports intelligent code completion, AI-assisted refactoring, test generation and other functions. Beautiful interface, intuitive operation, suitable for various development scenarios.

tools.name: OpenCode
tools.priceDescription: 完全免费，可自定义接入 OpenAI/Anthropic 等 API
tools.priceDescriptionEn: Completely free, can custom integrate with OpenAI/Anthropic APIs
tools.description: OpenCode 是一个免费的 AI 编程工具，提供智能代码补全、AI 辅助编程等功能。支持多种编程语言，界面简洁直观，适合开发者日常使用。
tools.descriptionEn: OpenCode is a free AI programming tool that provides intelligent code completion, AI-assisted programming and other functions. Supports multiple programming languages, with a clean and intuitive interface, suitable for daily use by developers.

tools.name: CodeBuddy
tools.priceDescription: 个人版免费（含 500 Credits / 月）；专业版 58 元 / 月
tools.priceDescriptionEn: Personal version free (with 500 Credits/month); Professional version ¥58/month
tools.description: 腾讯云出品的 AI 编程工具，提供智能代码补全、代码解释、 bug 修复等功能。支持 VS Code 和 JetBrains，适合团队协作开发。
tools.descriptionEn: AI programming tool developed by Tencent Cloud, provides intelligent code completion, code explanation, bug fixing and other functions. Supports VS Code and JetBrains, suitable for team collaboration development.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.description: AI 原生代码编辑器，基于 VS Code 深度改造。Tab 智能补全体验目前最丝滑，能预判你接下来要写的整段代码。Agent 模式可以多文件联动修改，Composer 支持对话式编程。支持接入 OpenAI、Claude、Gemini 等多家模型。
tools.descriptionEn: AI native code editor, deeply modified based on VS Code. The Tab intelligent completion experience is currently the smoothest, able to predict the entire code you're about to write. Agent mode can modify multiple files联动, Composer supports conversational programming. Supports integration with OpenAI, Claude, Gemini and other models.

tools.name: Kiro
tools.priceDescription: 免费版 50 次请求 / 月；Pro $19/月（1000次请求）；Pro+ $39 / 月（3000 次请求）
tools.priceDescriptionEn: Free version 50 requests/month; Pro $19/month (1000 requests); Pro+ $39/month (3000 requests)
tools.description: Amazon AWS 出品的 AI 编程工具，提供智能代码补全、AI 辅助编程等功能。支持多种编程语言，适合云开发场景。
tools.descriptionEn: AI programming tool developed by Amazon AWS, provides intelligent code completion, AI-assisted programming and other functions. Supports multiple programming languages, suitable for cloud development scenarios.

tools.name: Windsurf
tools.priceDescription: 免费版含 100 次 AI 请求；Pro $12 / 月
tools.priceDescriptionEn: Free version with 100 AI requests; Pro $12/month
tools.description: AI 原生编辑器，前身是 Codeium，2025 年底品牌升级为 Windsurf。Cascade 模式是亮点——Agent 能跨多个文件理解上下文并联动修改。UI 交互跟 Cursor 很像，VS Code 用户零学习成本。
tools.descriptionEn: AI native editor, formerly Codeium, rebranded to Windsurf at the end of 2025. The Cascade mode is a highlight - Agent can understand context across multiple files and modify them联动. UI interaction is very similar to Cursor, zero learning cost for VS Code users.

tools.name: GitHub Copilot
tools.priceDescription: $10 / 月（个人）；学生 / 教师免费
tools.description: IDE 插件，VS Code / JetBrains / Neovim 原生集成。行内代码补全起家，现在加了 Copilot Chat 对话能力和 Agent 模式。最大优势是跟 GitHub 生态深度绑定——PR Review、Issue 分析、Actions 集成一条龙。
tools.descriptionEn: IDE plugin, natively integrated with VS Code / JetBrains / Neovim. Started with inline code completion, now added Copilot Chat conversational capability and Agent mode. The biggest advantage is deep integration with GitHub ecosystem - PR Review, Issue analysis, Actions integration.

tools.name: 通义灵码
tools.priceDescription: 个人版免费；企业版按需付费
tools.priceDescriptionEn: Personal version free; enterprise version pay as you go
tools.description: 阿里云出品的 IDE 插件，支持 VS Code 和 JetBrains。提供智能代码补全、代码解释、 bug 修复等功能。与阿里云生态深度集成，适合企业级开发。
tools.descriptionEn: IDE plugin developed by Alibaba Cloud, supports VS Code and JetBrains. Provides intelligent code completion, code explanation, bug fixing and other functions. Deeply integrated with Alibaba Cloud ecosystem, suitable for enterprise-level development.

tools.name: Gemini CLI
tools.priceDescription: 免费（基础模型）；Pro 版 $19.99 / 月
tools.description: 终端 AI Agent，Google 出品。跟 Claude Code 类似的终端 Agent，支持代码理解、修改、测试等能力。最大优势是免费使用，适合预算有限的开发者。
tools.descriptionEn: Terminal AI Agent, developed by Google. Similar to Claude Code, supports code understanding, modification, testing and other capabilities. The biggest advantage is free usage, suitable for developers with limited budget.

tools.name: Qoder
tools.priceDescription: 免费版含基础功能；Pro $15 / 月
tools.priceDescriptionEn: Free version with basic features; Pro $15/month
tools.description: 国内 AI 原生 IDE，专为中文开发者优化。支持智能代码补全、对话式编程、多文件联动修改等功能。界面简洁，操作流畅，适合前端和后端开发。
tools.descriptionEn: Domestic AI native IDE, optimized for Chinese developers. Supports intelligent code completion, conversational programming, multi-file linkage modification and other functions. Clean interface, smooth operation, suitable for front-end and back-end development.
